zh.Orby, East Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽
zh.lifeSummary: 當Herbert de Orreby V於1140年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾多比時，他的父親Alard de Orreby31歲，母親Agnes de Arques30歲。他於1166年與Agnes Kyme在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾哈尼阿比結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1180年在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾哈尼阿比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Orreby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Orry
meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When Herbert de Orreby V was born in 1140, in Orby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alard de Orreby, was 31 and his mother, Agnes de Arques, was 30. He married Agnes Kyme in 1166, in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died about 1180, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herbert de Orreby V est né en 1140, à Orby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alard de Orreby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Arques, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Kyme en 1166, à Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé environ 1180, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Orby, East Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Englan: Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Herbert de Orreby V 1140 in Orby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alard de Orreby 31 und seine Mutter Agnes de Arques 30. Er hat 1166 in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Kyme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb um 1180 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes Kyme nel 1166, nel Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì circa 1180, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Herbert de Orreby Vが1140年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアオルビーで生まれた時，父Alard de Orrebyは31歳，母Agnes de Arquesは30歳であった。1166年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハグナビーでAgnes Kymeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は約1180年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアハグナビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Orby, East Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지
ko.lifeSummary: Herbert de Orreby V(이)가 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 오비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alard de Orreby(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Arques(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1166년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 하그나비에서 Agnes Kyme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1180년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 하그나비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert de Orreby V nasceu em 1140, em Orby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alard de Orreby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Arques, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Kyme em 1166, em Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1180, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Orby, East Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Englan: парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herbert de Orreby V родился в 1140 г. в местности орби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alard de Orreby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Arques, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Kyme в 1166 г. в местности хагнаби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер около 1180 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности хагнаби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Agnes Kyme en 1166, en Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1180, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
